clv_history_blocker.reason: BLOCKED: no CLV stamping / price-capture history exists for PM advancement markets (no fixed close; convergence metrics still COLLECTING). Live-money gate: a market without price capture + CLV stamping does not get real money. This desk is SHADOW-ONLY until that plumbing ships.

caveats: SHADOW-ONLY: decision-support feed; no verdict here is a trade instruction and nothing is wired to execution.
All rows settle on ADVANCEMENT incl. extra time + penalties — NOT 90-min 1X2.
